name: Herbed Whole Wheat Bread Crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut stale bread into small pieces and place in a bowl.
2. Sprinkle dried basil, thyme, chervil, garlic, and shallots over the bread pieces.
3. Mix gently until all the bread is evenly coated with herbs.
4. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container or freezer bag.
5. Store in the freezer for up to 1 month.
6. When ready to use, scoop out 1 cup of breadcrumbs (approximately 8-10 tablespoons).
7. The recipe yields about 1 cup of bread crumbs, with each tablespoon containing approximately 7 calories.
